frontpage.services.lead: Specialized support on taxation, mediation, and compliance to live and work in Italy.
frontpage.services.service1.title: Living in Italy
frontpage.services.service1.body: Practical support to help you navigate everyday and administrative life in Italy.
frontpage.services.service2.title: Tax mediation
frontpage.services.service2.body: Mediation and guidance to understand fiscal procedures and communications.
frontpage.services.service3.title: Accounting support for flat-rate VAT number
frontpage.services.service3.body: Accounting support dedicated to professionals operating under the Italian flat-rate tax regime.
frontpage.services.service4.title: Tax guidance and clarifications
frontpage.services.service4.body: Guidance and clarifications on common tax questions and key obligations.
